name: vercel-ai-file-tree
title: File Tree
author: Vercel
description: A controlled file hierarchy with disclosure, selection, and nested actions.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Removed incomplete ARIA tree roles so native nested buttons expose honest disclosure semantics.
Added reduced-motion handling and logical spacing for RTL.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Removed incomplete ARIA tree roles so native nested buttons expose honest disclosure semantics. Added reduced-motion handling and logical spacing for RTL.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
